title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
description: <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/Google_Translate_20th_hero_NC8a.max-600x600.format-webp.webp">Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
